text.title: Compliance Checklist by Domain — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to produce the artefact end-to-end.

step.name: collect-inputs
step.action: Pull typed inputs with source paths/URLs; reject untyped prose.

step.name: synthesize
step.action: Apply the rubric / template; produce a draft output with rationale.

step.name: review-and-version
step.action: Owner reviews; on approval, bump version + last_reviewed.

step.name: publish
step.action: Persist to the artefact store + notify downstream consumers.
